en.text: apparently from a simpler (obsolete) form of ὑδέω (to celebrate; probably akin to G0103; compare H5667); a "hymn" or religious ode (one of the Psalms)

senses.gloss_en: apparently from a simpler (obsolete) form of ὑδέω (to celebrate; probably akin to G0103; compare H5667); a "hymn" or religious ode (one of the Psalms)
